spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Since many seem to have trouble reading a normal image, here's a detailed description of the entire scene with Imu vs. Zoro's group: - Imu jumps into the middle where Zoro's group is. He
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Since many seem to have trouble reading a normal image, here's a detailed description of the entire scene with Imu vs. Zoro's group: - Imu jumps into the middle where Zoro's group is. He attacks Gerd without Zoro and the others even noticing. - Zoro prepares to attack. Hajrudin comes to his aid but is stopped by Stansen, who loses his leg. Scene one in the first picture: - Imu notices that Zoro is going to attack him (black circle). - Imu remains calm and continues looking ahead, as we can see in the second panel. Image two: - At the top, we see that Imu has turned his gaze away from Zoro. - He continues looking ahead. His tail easily blocks KoH. Without looking back at Zoro, Imu continues walking but is using Omen. He attacks Zoro and keeps walking, not even acknowledging Zoro. - Imu then encounters Zoro and continues walking. In the last red circle, we see Imu notice that Hajrudin is about to attack him... Why are Zoro bros having trouble seeing this? It's right there in black and white. You're not saying the color blue is yellow, are you? Imu only noticed Zoro once, at the beginning. After that, he turned his head straight ahead, didn't even acknowledge Zoro, and used Omen to knock him to the ground. This scene couldn't be described more simply. Stop gaslighting; this scene is truly humiliating (not for me, though; being defeated like that by the strongest character in the verse is pretty normal, but it seems like you guys have hard time to progress it). And yes the Aizen gift as hint was wrong, actually the scene in manga with Zoro vs Imu is worse than what Aizen did to Ichigo... You're trying to fake the information with gaslight/cope, but it's all there in black and white in the picture. There's no way to excuse it. And no more mercy in the future spoilers for you guys...
